nasb.text: “Enter through the narrow gate; for the gate is wide and the way is broad that leads to destruction, and there are many who enter through it.

esv.text: “Enter by the narrow gate. For the gate is wide and the way is easy    that leads to destruction, and those who enter by it are many.

cnv.text: “你們當進窄門，因為引到滅亡的門是寬的，路是大的，進去的人也多；

ccb.text: “你们要进窄门，因为通向灭亡的门大，路宽，进去的人也多；

csbs.text: “你们要从窄门进去；因为那通向灭亡    的门是大的，那条路是宽的，从那里进去的人也多；
